item.title: Extract help text to file and kill cmd_usage duplicate
item.intent: Help text lives in a file, not inline bash. The duplicate cmd_usage is eliminated. All help entry points produce the same output.
item.description: cmd_help (110 lines) and cmd_usage (45 lines) are near-duplicates. Extract cmd_help body to .aishore/help.txt, make cmd_help just cat it with version substitution, and point cmd_usage at cmd_help. Net savings ~150 lines.
steps: Extract cmd_help body to .aishore/help.txt with a VERSION placeholder
Replace cmd_help body with: sed to substitute version, then cat
Delete cmd_usage function body, replace with call to cmd_help
Verify all entry points work: help, --help, -h, usage, no-args
acceptanceCriteria: help.txt exists in .aishore/ and contains the full help text
cmd_usage function is removed or is a one-line alias to cmd_help
.aishore/aishore help output is identical to before
